# International School

### Welcome to Sunmarke School

A Passionately Character-Building & Innovative School in the Middle East

Sunmarke provides an ambitious and inspiring values-based education nurturing the hearts and minds of young boys and girls so that they can flourish and achieve their dreams.

_Simply put, we transform young lives._

Powered by our unique, leading-edge Signature Programmes, we are an incredibly innovative school reshaping and inspiring tomorrow’s generation.

We are amongst the top 5 schools in Dubai, as seen by our outstanding IB and A-Level results, top university placements, and notable student achievements in the arts, sports, and extracurriculars.

metadata.title: British Curriculum Schools - Sunmarke School, Best School in Dubai

text:
We are amongst the top 5 schools in Dubai, as seen by our outstanding IB and A-Level results, top university placements, and notable student achievements in the arts, sports, and extracurriculars.

We are a recognised global leader in Positive Education – a paradigm shift in education worldwide – where it’s increasingly acknowledged that truly outstanding teaching and learning is only attained by developing “academic and personal excellence” as well as “well-being and character”.

We are one of the few schools in the UAE to offer both the IB and A-Level curriculum pathways, as well as the BTECs.

Backed by Fortes Education’s rich history of over 40 years in academia, Sunmarke is rated “Outstanding” by the British School Overseas Inspection Authority and “Very Good” by KHDA.

### Our Purpose

We aim to inspire young boys and girls to thrive and flourish with purpose.

### STEAM & Design Thinking

Students become creative problem-solvers through hands-on projects in coding, robotics, AI, 3D printing, and sustainable design, developing critical thinking, collaboration, and innovative solutions with real-world impact.

### Environment & Sustainability

Students develop eco-leadership through outdoor learning, gardens, and real-world experiences, gaining sustainability skills, respect for nature, and the ability to drive positive environmental change in communities.

Sunmarke’s Pro Sports Academy develops athletes through elite coaching, 100+ squads, and global competitions, integrating fitness, nutrition, and resilience for lifelong excellence, discipline, and success beyond sport.

The Global Languages Programme immerses students in Hindi and Mandarin, fostering communication, cultural awareness, empathy, and adaptability through storytelling, projects, traditions, and real-life experiences for global readiness.

[Learn more](https://www.sunmarke.com/signature-programmes/global-language-academy/)

# Early Years Curriculum

[Learning](https://www.sunmarke.com/learning/ "Go to Learning.") \> [EYFS](https://www.sunmarke.com/learning/eyfs/ "Go to EYFS.") \> Early Years Curriculum

# Early Years Curriculum

Setting The Foundation For A Fulfilling Educational Journey

Sunmarke’s Early Years Foundation Stage (EYFS) offers a broad and balanced curriculum for our youngest students aged 3 to 5 years, once again proving its credentials as one of the best British curriculum schools in Dubai. Children acquire new skills through 7 areas of learning and development.

**In the initial stages, three Prime Areas are in focus:**

- Personal, Social and Emotional Development
- Physical Development
- Communication and Language Development.

**Growing up, the Prime Areas help develop skills in 4 Specific Areas:**

- Literacy
- Mathematics
- Understanding of the World
- Expressive Arts and Design

![EYFS_Our-Curriculum-1](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

metadata.title: EYFS - Early Years Curriculum for FS1 & FS2 | Sunmarke School Dubai

text:
- Literacy
- Mathematics
- Understanding of the World
- Expressive Arts and Design

![EYFS_Our-Curriculum-1](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

![EYFS_Our-Curriculum-2](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

#### Laying the Foundations for Lifelong Learning in FS1 and FS2

At Sunmarke, our Early Years Foundation Stage (EYFS), comprising **FS1 (Nursery)** and **FS2 (Reception)**, offers a broad, balanced, and enriching curriculum for children aged 3 to 5. Rooted in the British curriculum and recognised as one of Dubai’s leading EYFS providers, our programme nurtures each child’s unique strengths and interests through play-based, inquiry-led learning.

**A Curriculum Designed Around the Whole Child**

The EYFS curriculum at FS1 and FS2 is structured around seven key areas of learning and development:

**Prime Areas (Early Focus):**

- **Personal, Social and Emotional Development**
- **Physical Development**
- **Communication and Language**

metadata.title: EYFS - Early Years Curriculum for FS1 & FS2 | Sunmarke School Dubai

text:
**Prime Areas (Early Focus):**

- **Personal, Social and Emotional Development**
- **Physical Development**
- **Communication and Language**

These areas are particularly emphasised in **FS1**, helping our youngest learners develop the essential foundations of confidence, relationships, movement, and communication.

**Specific Areas (Building on the Foundations):**

- **Literacy**
- **Mathematics**
- **Understanding the World**
- **Expressive Arts and Design**

As children progress into **FS2**, these specific areas become more prominent, supporting emerging literacy and numeracy skills, creative expression, and a growing awareness of the world.

**Characteristics of Effective Learning**

Across FS1 and FS2, we recognise that children learn in different ways. The EYFS framework promotes three key learning characteristics:

metadata.title: EYFS - Early Years Curriculum for FS1 & FS2 | Sunmarke School Dubai

text:
**Characteristics of Effective Learning**

Across FS1 and FS2, we recognise that children learn in different ways. The EYFS framework promotes three key learning characteristics:

- **Playing and Exploring:** Investigating and experiencing, ‘having a go’
- **Active Learning:** Concentrating, persevering, and celebrating achievement
- **Creating and Thinking Critically:** Developing ideas, making connections, and problem-solving

These traits guide how learning is planned and delivered across both FS1 and FS2, ensuring that each child’s development is supported in a way that reflects their interests, needs, and learning styles.

**Learning Through Play and Projects**

At Sunmarke, we view **play** as a powerful vehicle for learning in both FS1 and FS2. Our curriculum is intentionally designed to offer rich, purposeful play experiences that allow children to explore, imagine, and make sense of the world in a way that is meaningful to them.

metadata.title: EYFS - Early Years Curriculum for FS1 & FS2 | Sunmarke School Dubai

text:
In **FS1**, children are encouraged to investigate through hands-on exploration, sensory play, and open-ended experiences that develop early communication, social, and physical skills. As they transition into **FS2**, children engage in more structured yet still playful learning that builds early literacy and numeracy skills while continuing to promote creativity and curiosity.

Our **project-based learning** approach further enhances engagement. Each term, both FS1 and FS2 children explore exciting, inquiry-led themes such as _“I Believe I Can Fly,” “Somewhere Out There,”_ and _“Up, Up and Away.”_ These projects spark imagination and are shaped by the children’s own interests and questions, creating a deep sense of ownership and wonder.

metadata.title: EYFS - Early Years Curriculum for FS1 & FS2 | Sunmarke School Dubai

text:
Whether FS1 children are building a fairy tale castle or FS2 pupils are investigating the planets, our environments are carefully curated to provide challenge, joy, and discovery. Through child-initiated and adult-guided activities, children develop critical thinking, collaboration, and communication—the building blocks of future learning.

**A Holistic and Nurturing Approach**

At Sunmarke, we believe that every child in FS1 and FS2 is a unique individual. Our holistic approach to early education goes beyond academics to nurture each child’s emotional, social, physical, and intellectual development.

We incorporate globally respected early years methodologies including elements of the **Reggio Emilia philosophy**, **Montessori principles**, and the **Curiosity Approach**. This eclectic framework values child-led exploration, independence, and a strong connection to the learning environment—creating rich opportunities for discovery and expression.

metadata.title: EYFS - Early Years Curriculum for FS1 & FS2 | Sunmarke School Dubai

text:
Our learning spaces are thoughtfully designed to be calm, beautiful, and engaging, reflecting the importance of the environment as the ‘third teacher’. Teachers and support staff observe closely, respond sensitively, and plan responsively to extend learning in authentic, meaningful ways.

Strong partnerships with parents, a passionate team of educators, and a shared belief in the limitless potential of every child create a warm, supportive community. In FS1 and FS2, children feel safe, seen, and inspired—laying a confident foundation for their journey through school and life.

#### Characteristics of Effective Learning

The characteristics of Effective Learning describe how children learn and respond to teaching in the Foundation Stage, a factor determined by their individual learning characteristic. Three traits of effective teaching and learning identified by the EYFS are:

**Playing and Exploring:** Finding out, discovering, willing to ‘have a go’ and playing with what they know

metadata.title: EYFS - Early Years Curriculum for FS1 & FS2 | Sunmarke School Dubai

text:
**Playing and Exploring:** Finding out, discovering, willing to ‘have a go’ and playing with what they know

**Active Learning:** Being involved and concentrating, trying and persevering, taking pleasure from achievements

**Creating and Thinking Critically:** Developing their own ideas, making links and selecting their own ways to complete tasks

#### 7 Curriculum Areas

To enhance the learning experience and make it impactful, Sunmarke has selected 7 curriculum areas taught through unique projects and interests, most of which are child-initiated activities that incorporate elements of imagination, investigation and ‘out of the box’ ideas, concepts and solutions.

The EYFS curriculum is designed and based on the philosophy of learning through play which enhances critical thinking abilities, fuels risk-taking and creative skills.

metadata.title: EYFS - Early Years Curriculum for FS1 & FS2 | Sunmarke School Dubai

text:
The EYFS curriculum is designed and based on the philosophy of learning through play which enhances critical thinking abilities, fuels risk-taking and creative skills.

Examples of topics are ‘I believe I can fly’, ‘Somewhere out there’ and ‘Up up and away.’ The initiative EYFS curriculum is designed and based on the philosophy of learning through play.

Our teaching philosophy is designed to treat all children as unique individuals in their own right. Our holistic approach towards education ensures that parents/carers, class teachers, specialist teachers and learning assistants work very effectively together to support our firm belief that ‘every child is unique’.

Our maxim is that happy and well-motivated children are good learners. The Foundation Stage is a safe, secure and friendly environment for our youngest children to gain confidence and independence, as they prepare for the next stage of schooling. It is a foundation for future learning.

metadata.title: EYFS - Early Years Curriculum for FS1 & FS2 | Sunmarke School Dubai

text:
Characteristics of Effective Learning (CoEL) are a revived element in the current Early Years Foundation Stage Curriculum (EYFS). CoEL advocates that while planning and guiding children’s activities, practitioners must reflect on the different ways that students learn, and these lessons must be reflected in their practice.

# Re-enrol Online

Procedure To Continue Your Educational Journey

Sunmarke owes its success as an international school offering the best British curriculum education in Dubai to the constant support and confidence families have reposed in us.

We encourage students to aim for the stars but we equally hold ourselves to high standards, committed to offering the best academic provision and value-for-money education in the UAE and larger MENA region.

metadata.title: Re-enrol Online - Sunmarke School | British Curriculum | International School in Dubai

text:
To continue your journey with us and to secure a seat for the academic year 2025-26, we encourage all our families to re-enrol online. A non-refundable re-enrolment fee of 5% must be paid by April 30, 2026, and will be deducted from the tuition fee due for the term of joining. Please note that if the re-enrolment fee is not paid by April 30, 2026, the entire Term 1 fee will be invoiced (subject to availability).

To re-enrol your child, please click the below link and log on to the [VLE portal](https://vle.forteseducation.com/) on your desktop or VLE Mobile App, and complete the Re-enrolment process online.

# Dining & Catering

Healthy, Wholesome And Nutritious Meals For Your Child

We understand the important role that health and nutrition play in a student’s overall wellbeing and therefore, encourage healthy eating habits from an early age. Towards this, we have partnered with Mastercook the catering experts, to tailor-make our dining menus and meal programmes.

![Food](https://cdn-ikpmegn.nitrocdn.com/SOawBvPqpXyyITKvALdRsImZEAviSvMW/assets/images/optimized/rev-5d1e155/www.sunmarke.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/food-tile-1.jpg)

![Food](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

We have a  bright and spacious cafeteria where students can enjoy healthy food options, socialise, and deepen their friendships. They can opt for pre-packaged food in environment-friendly packs as well. We also provide Grab & Go snacks for them.

[Learning](https://www.sunmarke.com/learning/ "Go to Learning.") \> [Primary](https://www.sunmarke.com/learning/primary/ "Go to Primary.") \> Creative & Performing Arts

# Creative & Performing Arts

A Creative Hub to Shape Students' Artistic and Aesthetic Sensibilities

Our classes in music, art, computing, languages, PE and others are carefully planned to match each year group’s STEAM projects wherever possible. They also embrace our Positive Education ethos and make meaningful links with moral, social and cultural studies objectives.

![Primary Photoshoot - Music-6661 - 1200x600](https://cdn-ikpmegn.nitrocdn.com/SOawBvPqpXyyITKvALdRsImZEAviSvMW/assets/images/optimized/rev-5d1e155/www.sunmarke.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Primary-Photoshoot-Music-6661-1200x600-1.jpg)

metadata.title: Creative & Performing Arts - Sunmarke Primary School, Dubai

text:
Students are taught to appreciate art and design from different periods, created by famous composers, engineers, linguists and sporting heroes. This enhances their knowledge of form, texture, pitch, tone, coding and robotics, pronunciation and composition, and timing and precision.

These skills are further built upon in ECAs, including our Performing Arts elective that prepares students for the annual musical performance. Stimulating displays in classrooms and corridors result in widespread appreciation of their achievements and efforts throughout the year.

![Primary Photoshoot - Music-7406657 - 620x 400](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

![Primary Photoshoot - Music-7406756 - 620x 400](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

#### Music

There is something for everyone in Sunmarke’s music department. Our specialist music teachers ignite every child’s passion for music, be they a grade 7 pianist or an enthusiast in different musical genres.

metadata.title: Creative & Performing Arts - Sunmarke Primary School, Dubai

text:
Students are encouraged to perform as much as possible: in assemblies, concerts, school productions – our school is their stage!

See the highlight pictures below from our previous musical, which brought _High School Musical_ to life with our talented Primary students. Stay tuned for this year’s spectacular production of _Roald Dahl’s Matilda the Musical_!

![Primary Musicals-03405 - 620 x 400](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

![Primary Musicals-03314 - 620 x 400](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

![Primary Musicals-3420 - 620 x 400](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

![Primary Musicals-03368 - 620x400](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

#### Performances

There are many opportunities for students to shine on stage at Sunmarke Primary, with a vibrant calendar of performances that celebrate creativity, confidence and collaboration. Each year, our students captivate audiences through a wide range of events:

metadata.title: Creative & Performing Arts - Sunmarke Primary School, Dubai

text:
- **Winter Performances:** Our Year 1 and 2 students take to the stage to share a heart-warming mix of songs, poems and dances, reflecting their learning journeys from Term 1.
- **Snowmarke:** A much-anticipated concert-style showcase, Snowmarke features selected students from Years 3 to 6 performing music, dance and drama with exceptional flair.
- **Summer Showcases:** Year 3 4 and 5 students take audiences on a musical journey inspired by their curriculum, with original performances that highlight their creativity and enthusiasm.
- **Primary Musical:** A highlight of the year, our annual musical sees Year 5 and 6 students audition, rehearse and perform in a full-scale production. Recent shows have included _Beauty & The Beast_, _Peter Pan_ **(and upcoming** _**Matilda Jr)**_, demonstrating the incredible talent and commitment of our young performers.

### Excellence

## British Values

As a British Schools Overseas (BSO) accredited school, Sunmarke School is committed to upholding the values and standards of a world-class British education. This includes a strong focus on the spiritual, moral, social and cultural development of our students, as well as the promotion of respect, tolerance, and responsibility. These principles align seamlessly with the values of the UAE, where respect for diversity and cultural understanding form the foundation of daily life. Together, these shared values shape our school community into one that is inclusive, aspirational, and globally minded.

metadata.title: Sunmarke Premium British Education | Best International School

text:
- **Rule of Law** – School policies, codes of conduct, and classroom expectations help pupils understand fairness, responsibility, and the importance of living within agreed rules, reflecting the laws of the UAE.
- **Individual Liberty** – We encourage independence and student choice in learning, while ensuring safety and guidance so pupils understand the balance between rights and responsibilities.
- **Mutual Respect** – Our Positive Education ethos, house system, and community partnerships promote kindness and respect in daily interactions across the school.
- **Tolerance of Different Faiths and Beliefs** – We celebrate the UAE’s cultural and religious diversity, providing opportunities to learn about and respect different traditions while remaining rooted in our own values.

metadata.title: Sunmarke Premium British Education | Best International School

text: - **Student Voice & Representation** – Pupils are given a voice through Student Council, Sports Leaders, and other leadership opportunities, ensuring they understand the importance of fairness, collaboration, and shared decision-making.

metadata.title: Sunmarke Premium British Education | Best International School

text:
## Why Educate Your Child at Sunmarke?

**A Rigorous & Ambitious Education**

We offer rigorous, ambitious and holistic education emphasising academic excellence and participation in diverse extracurricular activities enabling children to achieve outstanding academic, social and personal success in a stimulating and supportive environment.

![YouTube player](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

**Outstanding Senior Leaders & Teachers**

All our inspiring senior leaders, teachers and staff are trained in Positive Education and best practices in education, and are provided continuous professional development and training to keep abreast of the latest developments in pedagogy.

![YouTube player](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

**Over Four Decades of History**

Built on the foundation of Fortes Education’s four decades of excellence in education, Sunmarke’s dynamic management team bring their rich experience and knowledge to deliver the best value-based education for students.

# Principal’s Message

# Principal’s Message

Mr. Nicholas Rickford

## Welcome to Sunmarke School – Where Amazing Happens

It is with great pleasure that I welcome you to Sunmarke School, a place where tailored academic pathways, innovative Signature Programmes and a holistic approach to Positive Education converge to provide an outstanding educational experience for your child.

metadata.title: Principal's Message | Sunmarke School

text:
At Sunmarke, we understand that every student is unique, with their own strengths, interests and aspirations. That is why we have developed a wide range of academic pathways that allow us to cater to the individual needs of every student. We are one of the very few schools to offer students the choice of A Level, IB Diploma, IB Career-related Programme and BTEC. By providing such enviable options and personalising learning experiences, we empower students to explore their passions and reach their full potential in a supportive and dynamic environment.

![YouTube player](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

metadata.title: Principal's Message | Sunmarke School

text:
![YouTube player](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

One of our key areas of focus is Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts and Mathematics. Our STEAM and Design Thinking curriculum fosters creativity, critical thinking and problem-solving skills. Through hands-on projects, collaborative learning and exposure to real-world applications, Sunmarke students engage with virtual reality, learn how to code and develop the essential skills of tech literacy and digital fluency.

As we prepare students for the future, we recognise the vital role that artificial intelligence (AI) plays in our society. We embrace AI, incorporating it into our curriculum and enabling learners to consider the limitless possibilities and ethical considerations associated with this transformative technology. Through our innovative AI programmes, students gain practical experience, develop computational thinking skills and become equipped to navigate the AI-driven world of tomorrow.

metadata.title: Principal's Message | Sunmarke School

text:
Our other Signature Programmes provide further opportunities for Sunmarke students to explore their interests and talents in specialised areas. From Performing Arts, Media and Communication to the Global Language Academy and Environment and Sustainability (which includes the incredible Forest School), our signature offerings inspire students to delve deep into their passions, develop expertise and build a strong sense of compassion and social responsibility.

At Sunmarke, we are extremely proud to offer a world-class, comprehensive Positive Education programme. We believe that academic success is intricately linked to emotional wellbeing, character development and the cultivation of positive relationships. Our PosEd framework fosters resilience, empathy and a growth mindset. Through mindfulness practices, character education and social-emotional learning, we enable all our students to thrive academically, emotionally and socially.

metadata.title: Principal's Message | Sunmarke School

text:
I invite you to explore our website to learn more about our academic strengths, unrivalled Signature Programmes and Positive Education approach. We look forward to partnering with you in nurturing your child’s intellectual curiosity, fostering their passions and equipping them for the future. In joining Sunmarke, your family will become part of a forward-thinking, vibrant and welcoming community “Where Amazing Happens”.

Warm regards,

![Nick-Principal](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

Nicholas Rickford

**Principal**

# A Positive Education School

[About](https://www.sunmarke.com/about/ "Go to About.") \> A Positive Education School

# A Positive Education School

A Philosophy Where Character Strengths Underpin Academic Excellence

Truly outstanding education is not just about academic and personal achievements but also about the development of character, values, and wellbeing. This is the essence of Positive Education (PosEd).

A scientifically-proven concept, PosEd is causing a paradigm shift in global education where parents, schools and governments realise the need to increase a child’s ‘wellbeing’ to raise his/her levels of ‘achievement’.

PosEd brings together the science of Positive Psychology combined with the best teaching practices to enable individuals, schools, and communities to flourish, be resilient, creative, successful and happy.

## Sunmarke – A Character-Building School

metadata.title: Sunmarke | Positive Education International School in Dubai

text:
## Sunmarke – A Character-Building School

Multiple studies on the effects of PosEd testify that improved levels of a child’s wellbeing are associated with higher levels of academic engagement, social skills, optimism, behaviour, and fewer mental health-related issues.

## Positive Education – Sunmarke’s DNA

Positive Education (PosEd) is not an additional subject at Sunmarke but it’s woven into the fabric of the international school’s culture and is reflected in all its activities and teaching mechanisms. Sunmarke’s teachers undergo an intense training programme before entering the classroom where they learn, live, teach and embed Positive Education.

This is what our teachers say about the Positive Education training they receive at Sunmarke:

metadata.title: Sunmarke | Positive Education International School in Dubai

text:
This is what our teachers say about the Positive Education training they receive at Sunmarke:

“Where amazing happens.  A motto that at first glance just appears to be some words to attract parents to send their children to Sunmarke school, almost like a gimmick.  Over the past 3 days for me amazing did happen.   The positive education training took me on a journey of self-discovery, showing me that changing my mindset can bring positive outcomes. I realized I have the power to make a difference in people’s lives. This training was the best I’ve ever received from a school, as they genuinely cared about us, ensuring we could apply what we learned in teaching and at home. It was an incredible experience, especially since I used to dislike training due to its lack of usefulness. This was entirely different – truly helpful, purposeful, and enlightening. It taught me to believe in the potential of education to inspire change.”

metadata.title: Sunmarke | Positive Education International School in Dubai

text:
“The breadth of knowledge, evidence-based theories, outstanding coordination and delivery, and just everything about this week was outstanding! I was blown away in every way possible and feel so supported, valued, and appreciated.”

![YouTube player](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

#### The ‘Flourish’ Model

###### The 6 Key Skills Practised and Taught by Sunmarke Teachers for Students to Incorporate in Their Lives

[![The-flourish-Model](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://sunmarke.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/The-flourish-Model.png)

#### SUNMARKE'S WELLBEING & COUNSELLING TEAM

Our PosEd and wellbeing approach fosters deep trust in our school community, creating a safe, welcoming and nurturing environment. We embed various initiatives into the daily routines, curriculum and extracurricular activities to establish a personal, social and academic support system each child needs to flourish.

metadata.title: Sunmarke | Positive Education International School in Dubai

text:
Class and Form Tutors, Heads of Year, and Subject teachers support students every day through direct teaching, mentoring, workshops and assemblies. The  Counselling Department provides compassionate care for children who may require professional support and or simply a sympathetic listening ear.

Students and parents both have access to a School Counsellor. A ‘Wellbeing Champion’ represents the school leadership in our Parent Association and ‘Friends of Sunmarke School’ (FOSS) group while the popular monthly ‘Wellness Wednesday’ event raises awareness among parents about crucial topics like strength-based parenting, raising children in the digital age and health and nutrition.

#### SUNMARKE'S SAFEGUARDING & CHILD PROTECTION TEAM

Sunmarke has a designated Safeguarding and Child Protection Team with Child Protection Officers at every Key Stage in primary and secondary school.

# Leadership

[About](https://www.sunmarke.com/about/ "Go to About.") \> Leadership

# Leadership

At the heart of leadership is a desire to serve and a dedication to helping others become great.

Sunmarke’s biggest strength is its passionate senior leadership team and faculty of teachers whose world-class experience in teaching, learning and administration has led the institution to be rated as one of the best schools in Dubai.

Our educators are commited to building character, wellbeing and values in a child, along with ensuring academic excellence with a strong belief in  Sunmarke’s disruptively innovative approach to education.

The school is guided by a Board of Governors comprising teachers, senior leaders, and a Parents’ Body who bring their rich professional experience, insight and advice to building one of the foremost British curriculum schools in Dubai.

metadata.title: Sunmarke Leadership Team | British Curriculum School in Dubai

text:
Sunmarke is further nurtured by a Board of Directors with over four decades of experience in school management. The Board supports the school’s growth by onboarding world-class senior leaders and teachers, and investing in up-to-date educational practices and facilities.

Our educators hail from top-ranked universities in the UK. The Director of Fortes Education, Dr Neil Hopkin, the ex-principal at Sunmarke school is a globally renowned Principal and thought leader in education. Our senior leaders are nationally recognised education practitioners in the UK and our teachers have been associated with leading schools in the UK and elsewhere in the world.

# Sunmarke's Wellbeing Zone

Promotion Of A Healthy Body And Mind For A Healthy Life

True wellbeing entails taking care of all aspects of your life including what you eat, where you move, how you sleep to your thoughts and feelings. On our wellbeing page you will find articles, guided practices and information on varied subjects that will help you on your own wellness journey.

![Grad (1)](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### FOR OUR STUDENTS

School, studies, friendships, and relationships can be exciting, enjoyable, overwhelming, and stressful. It is incredibly important to take care of yourself physically through mindful eating, exercising, and getting enough sleep, as well as mentally from a social and emotional perspective.

These mindful colouring sheets can be used as calming activities with you and your family

The Wellbeing Team at Sunmarke School are always here to assist you. The designated Wellbeing Department (EYFS/ Primary/ Secondary) for your child will then appear in the drop down menu, please type your message and submit. A member of the Wellbeing team will be in touch with you to see how they can best support you and your family.

## KHDA Inspection Report 2023-24 – Rated “Very Good”

Sunmarke achieved “ **Outstanding**” and “ **Very Good**” ratings in the **Knowledge and Human Development Agency (KHDA)** and **Dubai School Inspection Bureau (DSIB) Report (2023-2024)** and received an overall “ **Very Good**”.

**[Click here](https://www.sunmarke.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Sunmarke-School-L.L.C_Parentreport.pdf)** to download the full report.

**5 OUTSTANDING features the inspectors found in EVERY phase of Sunmarke School:**

1. Health and safety, including arrangements for child protection and safeguarding
2. Care and support
3. Students’ personal development
4. Social responsibility and innovation skills
5. Understanding of Islamic values and awareness of Emirati and world cultures

**10 AMAZING things the inspectors say about Sunmarke School:**

metadata.title: Sunmarke Outstanding School | KHDA Inpection Report

text:
**10 AMAZING things the inspectors say about Sunmarke School:**

01. We are highly inclusive.
02. We have a clear vision for ensuring the wellbeing of everyone, which is founded on Positive Education.
03. We use rigorous policies, systems, and practices that ensure students’ safety.
04. We demonstrate mutual respect and open communication that contribute to a thriving leadership culture.
05. We have premises which are of excellent quality and are meticulously maintained.
06. We have outstanding resources to support teaching and learning.
07. We use assessment well in lesson planning and gauge understanding through probing questioning.
08. Sunmarke students demonstrate a strong sense of responsibility and independence; they interact with maturity and confidence.
09. Sunmarke students are enthusiastic learners who have a well-developed sense of conservation and sustainability.
10. Sunmarke parents actively contribute to the school and FOSS ensures community cohesion.

# The Achievement Centre – Inclusion Department

Making Learning Accessible To All

Inclusivity is enshrined in Sunmarke’s ethos where we welcome a diverse range of learners from EYFS to Secondary. The Achievement Centre takes the lead in providing an inclusive education to students in close collaboration with parents, teachers and external specialists.

“

Jayne West

Head Of Inclusion

Laila is a Global Ambassador representing sports for People of Determination worldwide.  She was an outstanding member of the Secondary Life Skills Class, where she gained the qualifications to be accepted into Dubai College of Leisure and Tourism further education course.  We are all very proud of her as she continues to inspire our students to believe in the dream!!!

metadata.title: Inclusion - Sunmarke School Dubai | National Curriculum of England

text:
To facilitate the successful participation and progress of all learners, a range of additional provisions, subject to staffing and availability, are offered at no extra cost. They include, but are not limited to:

- Interventions for literacy
- Interventions for mathematics
- Speaking and listening
- Social skills
- Motor skills
- Directed studies
- Extra-curricular activities specific to students with SEND (Special Educational Needs & Disabilities)

## Commitment to Inclusion

metadata.title: Inclusion - Sunmarke School Dubai | National Curriculum of England

text:
## Commitment to Inclusion

- Our school is also an accredited centre for the BTEC Introductory Awards offering a wide range of both academic and vocational units including Business Administration, Media, Health and Fitness, Leisure and Hospitality.
- It has a highly successful SEND department which has been commended in our most recent DSIB (Dubai School Inspection Bureau) inspection.
- We have developed a reliable network of external providers, who parents can contract to provide specialist assessment and therapy services at Sunmarke. These include, but are not limited to:

1. Comprehensive developmental and diagnostic assessment
2. Psycho-educational assessment
3. Behavioural assessment and intervention
4. Occupational Therapy and Sensory Integration assessment and intervention
5. Speech and Language Therapy assessment and intervention
6. Personalised support from a 1:1 Learning Support Assistant

## Fortes English Language Programme

metadata.title: Inclusion - Sunmarke School Dubai | National Curriculum of England

text:
## Fortes English Language Programme

The Fortes English Language Programme is an intensive programme of cross curricular, full immersion pedagogy, with a focus on academic English, alongside every day language and culture.

Students learn language alongside new skills and all within a broad range of subjects and activities such as Art, Drama, PE and Sport, Music in addition to the usual core subjects. Students experience accelerated language acquisition and achieve a deeper understanding of subject-specific English across the curriculum.
